titles.title: Such Love Pure as the Whitest Snow

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Such Love, Pure As The Whitest Snow Such Love, Weeps For The Shame I Know, Such Love, Paying The Debt I Owe, O, Jesus, Such Love.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Such Love, Stilling My Restlessness Such Love, Filling My Emptiness Such Love, Showing Me Holiness O, Jesus, Such Love.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Such Love, Springs From Eternity Such Love, Streaming Through History, Such Love, Fountain Of Life To Me, O, Jesus, Such Love.
